user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select the KRA & Goals Based review type, so that the organization can run performance reviews aligned to employee goals
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Review Configuration screen; When I choose "KRA & Goals Based" and click Save; Then the goals-based review type is applied to the module

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select the Project Based review type, so that the organization can run 360-degree project-based evaluations
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Performance Review Configuration screen; When I choose "Project Based" and click Save; Then the project-based review type with 360-degree evaluations is applied

user_story: As an HR admin, I want the system to enforce that only one review type can be selected and locked once a review is initiated, so that review data stays consistent
acceptance_criteria: Given a review type has been selected and a review is initiated; When I attempt to switch the review type; Then the system prevents switching back to another type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my configuration and continue to the next setup step, so that I can complete performance review setup efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen a review type; When I click Save & Next; Then my selection is saved and I am taken to the next configuration step

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel my changes on the configuration screen, so that I can discard an unintended selection
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes on the Performance Review Configuration screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded
